data.issueTitle: Atom 1.28 crashes on macOS with Shadowsocks proxy
data.body: If I use the PAC mode, atom will crash abnormally, but the global mode was okay.

data.title: Atom 1.28.0 crashes when turn on shadowsocks PAC mode on macOS High Sierra 10.13.5
data.body:
### Description

I often use ss, but recently the atom crashes when I use PAC mode, and there is no problem in global mode.

### Steps to Reproduce

1. Open atom.
2. Open shadowsocks PAC mode.
3. Atom crashes.

**Expected behavior:** no crashes.

**Actual behavior:** It crashes when open ss PAC mode

**Reproduces how often:** always

### Versions

apm  1.19.0
npm  3.10.10
node 6.9.5 x64
atom 1.28.0
python 2.7.14
git 2.15.2

macOS High Sierra
version 10.13.5
